summary: Physical AI agents for hospital operations and disinfection.
editor_note: The real bet is that hospital AI should act in the room, not sit in the chart. Shyld AI shows 3D LiDAR, radar, infrared sensing, edge GPUs, UV-C cycles, and a Stanford-linked 93% contamination reduction claim. Unlike ambient scribes, this is physical AI that changes OR turnover and infection-control workflows. The risk is whether hospital deployment speed matches the clinical evidence.
